/opsx:continue.description: 基于依赖关系创建下一个工件
/opsx:continue.source: Create the next artifact based on dependencies

/opsx:ff.description: 快速推进：一次性创建所有规划工件
/opsx:ff.source: Fast-forward: create all planning artifacts at once

/opsx:verify.description: 验证实现是否与制品匹配

/opsx:sync.description: 将增量规格合并到主规格中
/opsx:sync.source: Merge delta specs into main specs

/opsx:explore.description: 在确定更改前先思考想法
/opsx:explore.source: Think through ideas before committing to a change

/opsx:onboard.description: 完整工作流程的引导式教程
/opsx:onboard.source: Guided tutorial through the complete workflow

desc:Philosophy.original: OpenSpec is built around four principles:
desc:Philosophy.translated: OpenSpec 围绕四大原则构建：

desc:The Big Picture.original: OpenSpec organizes your work into two main areas:
desc:The Big Picture.translated: OpenSpec 将您的工作组织为两个主要领域：

title:Specs.translated:
核心概念标题：

规格说明

desc:Specs.original: Specs describe your system's behavior using structured requirements and scenarios.
desc:Specs.translated: 规格说明通过结构化需求和场景来描述系统的行为。

desc:Purpose.original: Authentication and session management for the application.
desc:Purpose.translated: 应用程序的身份验证和会话管理。

desc:Requirements.original: The system SHALL issue a JWT token upon successful login.
desc:Requirements.translated: 系统应在成功登录后签发 JWT 令牌。

desc:Changes.original: A change is a proposed modification to your system, packaged as a folder with everything needed to understand and implement it.
desc:Changes.translated: 变更是指对系统提出的修改建议，以文件夹形式封装，包含理解和实施该变更所需的所有内容。

desc:Artifacts.original: Artifacts are the documents within a change that guide the work.
desc:Artifacts.translated: 工件是变更中的文档，用于指导工作。

desc:Intent.original: Users have requested a dark mode option to reduce eye strain during nighttime usage and match system preferences.
desc:Intent.translated: 用户要求提供深色模式选项，以减轻夜间使用时的视觉疲劳，并与系统偏好设置保持一致。

desc:Approach.original: Use CSS custom properties for theming with a React context for state management. Detect system preference on first load, allow manual override.
desc:Approach.translated: 使用 CSS 自定义属性实现主题化，配合 React 上下文进行状态管理。首次加载时检测系统偏好设置，并允许手动覆盖。

desc:Technical Approach.original: Theme state managed via React Context to avoid prop drilling. CSS custom properties enable runtime switching without class toggling.
desc:Technical Approach.translated: 通过React Context管理主题状态，避免属性透传。CSS自定义属性支持运行时切换，无需类名切换。

desc:Architecture Decisions.original: Using React Context for theme state because:
desc:Architecture Decisions.translated: 使用 React Context 管理主题状态的原因：

desc:Delta Specs.original: Delta specs are the key concept that makes OpenSpec work for brownfield development. They describe what's changing rather than restating the entire spec.
desc:Delta Specs.translated: Delta specs 是使 OpenSpec 适用于遗留系统开发的核心概念。它们描述的是变更内容，而非重新声明整个规范。

desc:ADDED Requirements.original: The system MUST support TOTP-based two-factor authentication.
desc:ADDED Requirements.translated: 系统必须支持基于TOTP的双因素认证。

desc:MODIFIED Requirements.original: The system MUST expire sessions after 15 minutes of inactivity. (Previously: 30 minutes)
desc:MODIFIED Requirements.translated: 系统必须在15分钟无活动后使会话失效。（之前：30分钟）

desc:REMOVED Requirements.original: (Deprecated in favor of 2FA. Users should re-authenticate each session.)
desc:REMOVED Requirements.translated: （已弃用，建议使用双因素认证。用户应在每个会话中重新进行身份验证。）

title:Schemas.translated:
核心概念标题：

模式

desc:Schemas.original: Schemas define the artifact types and their dependencies for a workflow.
desc:Schemas.translated: 模式定义了工作流中的工件类型及其依赖关系。

desc:Archive.original: Archiving completes a change by merging its delta specs into the main specs and preserving the change for history.
desc:Archive.translated: 归档通过将变更的增量规格合并到主规格中并保留变更历史来完成一个变更。

title:How It All Fits Together.translated: 核心概念：整体架构解析

glossary-def:Artifact.original: A document within a change (proposal, design, tasks, or delta specs)
glossary-def:Artifact.translated: 变更中的文档（提案、设计、任务或增量规范）

glossary-def:Archive.original: The process of completing a change and merging its deltas into main specs
glossary-def:Archive.translated: 完成变更并将其增量合并到主规范中的过程

glossary-def:Change.original: A proposed modification to the system, packaged as a folder with artifacts
glossary-def:Change.translated: 对系统提出的修改建议，以包含工件的文件夹形式打包

glossary-def:Delta spec.original: A spec that describes changes (ADDED/MODIFIED/REMOVED) relative to current specs
glossary-def:Delta spec.translated: 描述相对于当前规格变更（新增/修改/删除）的规格说明

glossary-def:Domain.original: A logical grouping for specs (e.g., auth/, payments/)
glossary-def:Domain.translated: 规范集的逻辑分组（例如：auth/、payments/）

glossary-def:Requirement.original: A specific behavior the system must have
glossary-def:Requirement.translated: 系统必须具备的特定行为

glossary-def:Scenario.original: A concrete example of a requirement, typically in Given/When/Then format
glossary-def:Scenario.translated: 需求的具体示例，通常采用 Given/When/Then 格式

glossary-def:Schema.original: A definition of artifact types and their dependencies
glossary-def:Schema.translated: 工件类型及其依赖关系的定义

glossary-def:Spec.original: A specification describing system behavior, containing requirements and scenarios
glossary-def:Spec.translated: 描述系统行为的规范，包含需求和场景

glossary-def:Source of truth.original: The openspec/specs/ directory, containing the current agreed-upon behavior
glossary-def:Source of truth.translated: openspec/specs/ 目录，包含当前已达成一致的行为规范

desc:How It Works.original: OpenSpec helps you and your AI coding assistant agree on what to build before any code is written. The workflow follows a simple pattern:
desc:How It Works.translated: OpenSpec 帮助您和您的 AI 编程助手在编写任何代码之前就构建内容达成一致。工作流程遵循一个简单的模式：

desc:What OpenSpec Creates.original: After running openspec init, your project has this structure:
desc:What OpenSpec Creates.translated: 运行 openspec init 后，你的项目结构如下：

desc:Understanding Artifacts.original: Each change folder contains artifacts that guide the work:
desc:Understanding Artifacts.translated: 每个变更文件夹都包含指导工作的构件：

desc:How Delta Specs Work.original: Delta specs are the key concept in OpenSpec. They show what's changing relative to your current specs.
desc:How Delta Specs Work.translated: Delta specs 是 OpenSpec 中的核心概念，用于展示相对于当前规格的变更内容。

desc:2. Create Artifacts.original: Use /opsx:ff (fast-forward) to create all planning artifacts at once:
desc:2. Create Artifacts.translated: 使用 /opsx:ff（快速前进）命令一次性创建所有规划工件：

desc:Verifying and Reviewing.original: Use the CLI to check on your changes:
desc:Verifying and Reviewing.translated: 使用 CLI 检查您的更改：

desc:Package Managers · npm.original: 使用 npm 安装 OpenSpec。
desc:Package Managers · npm.translated: 使用 npm 安装 OpenSpec。

desc:Package Managers · pnpm.original: 使用 pnpm 安装 OpenSpec。
desc:Package Managers · pnpm.translated: 使用 pnpm 安装 OpenSpec。

desc:Package Managers · yarn.original: 使用 yarn 安装 OpenSpec。
desc:Package Managers · yarn.translated: 使用 yarn 安装 OpenSpec。

desc:Package Managers · bun.original: 使用 bun 安装 OpenSpec。
desc:Package Managers · bun.translated: 使用 bun 安装 OpenSpec。

desc:Nix.translated: 无需安装直接运行 OpenSpec：

desc:Next Steps.original: After installing, initialize OpenSpec in your project:
desc:Next Steps.translated: 安装完成后，在您的项目中初始化 OpenSpec：

desc:openspec init.original: Initialize OpenSpec in your project. Creates the folder structure and configures AI tool integrations.
desc:openspec init.translated: 初始化项目中的 OpenSpec。创建文件夹结构并配置 AI 工具集成。

desc:openspec update.original: Update OpenSpec instruction files after upgrading the CLI. Re-generates AI tool configuration files.
desc:openspec update.translated: 更新 CLI 后，更新 OpenSpec 指令文件。重新生成 AI 工具配置文件。

desc:openspec list.original: List changes or specs in your project.
desc:openspec list.translated: 列出项目中的变更或规格。

desc:openspec view.original: Display an interactive dashboard for exploring specs and changes.
desc:openspec view.translated: 显示用于探索规格和变更的交互式仪表板。

desc:openspec show.original: Display details of a change or spec.
desc:openspec show.translated: 显示变更或规范的详细信息。

desc:openspec validate.original: Validate changes and specs for structural issues.
desc:openspec validate.translated: 验证变更和规格的结构性问题。

desc:openspec archive.original: Archive a completed change and merge delta specs into main specs.
desc:openspec archive.translated: 归档已完成的变更并将增量规格合并至主规格。

desc:openspec status.original: Display artifact completion status for a change.
desc:openspec status.translated: 显示变更的制品完成状态。

desc:openspec instructions.original: Get enriched instructions for creating an artifact or applying tasks. Used by AI agents to understand what to create next.
desc:openspec instructions.translated: 获取创建工件或应用任务的详细说明。供AI代理理解下一步创建内容时使用。

desc:openspec templates.original: Show resolved template paths for all artifacts in a schema.
desc:openspec templates.translated: 显示架构中所有构件的已解析模板路径。

desc:openspec schemas.original: List available workflow schemas with their descriptions and artifact flows.
desc:openspec schemas.translated: 列出可用的工作流模式及其描述和工件流程。

desc:openspec schema init.translated: 创建新的项目本地架构。

desc:openspec schema fork.original: Copy an existing schema to your project for customization.
desc:openspec schema fork.translated: 将现有架构复制到您的项目中进行自定义。

desc:openspec schema validate.original: Validate a schema's structure and templates.
desc:openspec schema validate.translated: 验证模式的结构与模板。

desc:openspec schema which.original: Show where a schema resolves from (useful for debugging precedence).
desc:openspec schema which.translated: 显示模式解析来源（有助于调试优先级）。

desc:openspec config.original: View and modify global OpenSpec configuration.
desc:openspec config.translated: 查看和修改全局 OpenSpec 配置。

desc:openspec feedback.original: Submit feedback about OpenSpec. Creates a GitHub issue.
desc:openspec feedback.translated: 提交关于 OpenSpec 的反馈。创建一个 GitHub issue。

desc:openspec completion.original: Manage shell completions for the OpenSpec CLI.
desc:openspec completion.translated: 管理 OpenSpec CLI 的 shell 自动补全功能。

desc:Project Configuration.original: The openspec/config.yaml file is the easiest way to customize OpenSpec for your team. It lets you:
desc:Project Configuration.translated: openspec/config.yaml 文件是为团队定制 OpenSpec 的最简便方式。它支持您：

desc:Custom Schemas.original: When project config isn't enough, create your own schema with a completely custom workflow. Custom schemas live in your project's openspec/schemas/ directory and are version-controlled with your code.
desc:Custom Schemas.translated: 当项目配置不够用时，可通过完全自定义的工作流程创建专属Schema。自定义Schema存放于项目的openspec/schemas/目录中，并随代码进行版本控制。

desc:Why.original: <!-- Explain the motivation for this change. What problem does this solve? -->
desc:Why.translated: <!-- 说明本次变更的动机。解决了什么问题？ -->

desc:What Changes.original: <!-- Describe what will change. Be specific about new capabilities or modifications. -->
desc:What Changes.translated: <!-- 请描述具体变更内容。详细说明新增功能或修改点。 -->

desc:Impact.original: <!-- Affected code, APIs, dependencies, systems --> openspec schema validate my-workflow
desc:Impact.translated: <!-- 受影响的代码、API、依赖项、系统 --> openspec schema validate my-workflow

desc:Examples.original: A minimal workflow for quick iterations:
desc:Examples.translated: 一个用于快速迭代的最小化工作流：

desc:What's Changing?.original: OPSX replaces the old phase-locked workflow with a fluid, action-based approach. Here's the key shift:
desc:What's Changing?.translated: OPSX 将原有的阶段锁定工作流替换为基于操作的灵活方法。核心转变如下：

desc:Before You Begin.original: The migration process is designed with preservation in mind:
desc:Before You Begin.translated: 迁移过程的设计理念是确保数据完整性：

desc:Running the Migration.original: Both openspec init and openspec update detect legacy files and guide you through the same cleanup process. Use whichever fits your situation:
desc:Running the Migration.translated: openspec init 和 openspec update 都能检测遗留文件并引导您完成相同的清理流程。请根据实际情况选择使用。

title:Migrating project.md to config.yam.translated: 将 project.md 迁移到 config.yaml

desc:Migrating project.md to config.yaml.original: The old openspec/project.md was a freeform markdown file for project context. The new openspec/config.yaml is structured and—critically—injected into every planning request so your conventions are always present when the AI works.
desc:Migrating project.md to config.yaml.translated: 旧的 openspec/project.md 是一个自由格式的 Markdown 文件，用于记录项目背景信息。新的 openspec/config.yaml 采用结构化格式，并且关键的是，它会被注入到每个规划请求中，因此当 AI 工作时，您的项目规范始终可用。

desc:The New Commands.original: After migration, you have 9 OPSX commands instead of 3:
desc:The New Commands.translated: 迁移完成后，您将拥有 9 个 OPSX 命令，而非原来的 3 个：

desc:Understanding the New Architecture.original: The legacy workflow forced linear progression:
desc:Understanding the New Architecture.translated: 传统工作流强制线性推进：

desc:Continuing Existing Changes.original: Your in-progress changes work seamlessly with OPSX commands.
desc:Continuing Existing Changes.translated: 您正在进行的更改可与 OPSX 命令无缝协作。

desc:The New Config System.original: When determining which schema to use, OPSX checks in order:
desc:The New Config System.translated: 当确定使用哪个模式时，OPSX按顺序检查：

desc:Troubleshooting.original: You're running in a CI or non-interactive environment. Use:
desc:Troubleshooting.translated: 您正在 CI 或非交互式环境中运行。请使用：

quickSetup.original:
schema: spec-driven

context: |
  Language: Portuguese (pt-BR)
  All artifacts must be written in Brazilian Portuguese.

  # Your other project context below...
  Tech stack: TypeScript, React, Node.js
quickSetup.translated:
schema: spec-driven

context: |
  Language: Portuguese (pt-BR)
  All artifacts must be written in Brazilian Portuguese.

  # Your other project context below...
  Tech stack: TypeScript, React, Node.js

snippet:Portuguese (Brazil).original:
context: |
  Language: Portuguese (pt-BR)
  All artifacts must be written in Brazilian Portuguese.
snippet:Portuguese (Brazil).translated:
多语言配置示例：

context: |
  Language: Portuguese (pt-BR)
  All artifacts must be written in Brazilian Portuguese.

snippet:Spanish.original:
context: |
  Idioma: Español
  Todos los artefactos deben escribirse en español.
snippet:Spanish.translated:

  语言：西班牙语
  所有制品都必须用西班牙语书写。

snippet:Chinese (Simplified).original:

  语言：中文（简体）
  所有产出物必须用简体中文撰写。

  语言：中文（简体）
  所有产出物必须用简体中文撰写。

  言語：日本語
  すべての成果物は日本語で作成してください。

  所有成果物请用日语制作。

  Langue : Français
  Tous les artefacts doivent être rédigés en français.

  所有工件必须用法语编写。

  Sprache: Deutsch
  Alle Artefakte müssen auf Deutsch verfasst werden.

  语言：德语
  所有工件必须用德语编写。

tip:Handle Technical Terms：Decide how to.original: Handle Technical Terms：Decide how to handle technical terminology:
tip:Handle Technical Terms：Decide how to.translated:
多语言最佳实践：

处理技术术语：确定如何处理技术术语：

tip:Combine with Other Context：Language.original: Combine with Other Context：Language settings work alongside your other project context:
tip:Combine with Other Context：Language.translated:
多语言最佳实践：

与其他上下文结合：语言设置与您的其他项目上下文协同工作：

pattern-desc:Quick Feature.original: When you know what you want to build and just need to execute:
pattern-desc:Quick Feature.translated: 当您明确构建目标并只需执行时：

pattern-bestfor:Quick Feature.original: Small to medium features, bug fixes, straightforward changes.
pattern-bestfor:Quick Feature.translated: 工作流适用场景：中小型功能开发、错误修复、简单变更。

pattern-desc:Exploratory.original: When requirements are unclear or you need to investigate first:
pattern-desc:Exploratory.translated: 当需求不明确或需要先进行调研时：

pattern-bestfor:Exploratory.original: Performance optimization, debugging, architectural decisions, unclear requirements.
pattern-bestfor:Exploratory.translated:
工作流适用场景：
性能优化、调试、架构决策、需求不明确。

pattern-desc:Parallel Changes.original: Work on multiple changes at once:

pattern-bestfor:Parallel Changes.original: Parallel work streams, urgent interrupts, team collaboration.
pattern-bestfor:Parallel Changes.translated: 工作流适用场景：并行工作流、紧急中断处理、团队协作。

best:Keep Changes Focused：One logical un.original: Keep Changes Focused：One logical unit of work per change. If you're doing "add feature X and also refactor Y", consider two separate changes.
best:Keep Changes Focused：One logical un.translated:
工作流最佳实践：

保持变更聚焦：每次变更只包含一个逻辑工作单元。如果你需要"添加功能X并重构Y"，请考虑分成两次独立的变更。

best:Use /opsx:explore for Unclear Requi.original: Use /opsx:explore for Unclear Requirements：Before committing to a change, explore the problem space:
best:Use /opsx:explore for Unclear Requi.translated:
工作流最佳实践：

需求不明确时使用 /opsx:explore：在确定变更前，先探索问题空间：

best:Verify Before Archiving：Use /opsx:v.original: Verify Before Archiving：Use /opsx:verify to check implementation matches artifacts:
best:Verify Before Archiving：Use /opsx:v.translated:
工作流最佳实践：

归档前验证：使用 /opsx:verify 命令检查实现是否与制品匹配。

best:Name Changes Clearly：Good names mak.original: Name Changes Clearly：Good names make openspec list useful:
best:Name Changes Clearly：Good names mak.translated:
工作流最佳实践：

命名清晰明确：好的命名能让 openspec 列表更有用：

desc:What Is It?.original: OPSX is now the standard workflow for OpenSpec.
desc:What Is It?.translated: OPSX 现已成为 OpenSpec 的标准工作流程。

desc:Why This Exists.original: The legacy OpenSpec workflow works, but it's locked down:
desc:Why This Exists.translated: 传统 OpenSpec 工作流虽然可用，但存在限制：

desc:The User Experience.original: The problem with linear workflows: You're "in planning phase", then "in implementation phase", then "done". But real work doesn't work that way. You implement something, realize your design was wrong, need to update specs, continue implementing. Linear phases fight against how work actually happens.
desc:The User Experience.translated: 线性工作流程的问题：你先是"处于规划阶段"，然后"处于实施阶段"，最后"完成"。但实际工作并非如此运作。你实现某个功能后，发现设计存在错误，需要更新规范，然后继续实施。线性阶段与实际工作的发生方式相悖。

desc:Setup.original: This creates skills in .claude/skills/ (or equivalent) that AI coding assistants auto-detect.
desc:Setup.translated: 这会在 .claude/skills/（或等效目录）中创建技能，供 AI 编程助手自动检测。

desc:Project Configuration.original: Project config lets you set defaults and inject project-specific context into all artifacts.
desc:Project Configuration.translated: 项目配置允许您设置默认值，并将项目特定的上下文注入所有工件中。

desc:Usage.original: Think through ideas, investigate problems, compare options. No structure required - just a thinking partner. When insights crystallize, transition to /opsx:new or /opsx:ff.
desc:Usage.translated: 思考想法、研究问题、比较方案。无需固定结构——只需一个思考伙伴。当思路清晰时，可转向 /opsx:new 或 /opsx:ff。

title:When to Update vs. Start Fresh.original: When to Update vs. Start Fresh
title:When to Update vs. Start Fresh.translated: 何时更新与何时重新开始

desc:When to Update vs. Start Fresh.original: You can always edit your proposal or specs before implementation. But when does refining become "this is different work"?
desc:When to Update vs. Start Fresh.translated: 在实施前，您可以随时编辑您的提案或规格说明。但何时调整会变成"这是不同的工作"呢？

desc:What's Different?.original: The key insight: work isn't linear. OPSX stops pretending it is.
desc:What's Different?.translated: 核心洞察：工作并非线性。OPSX 不再假装它是。

desc:Architecture Deep Dive.original: This section explains how OPSX works under the hood and how it compares to the legacy workflow.
desc:Architecture Deep Dive.translated: 本节将深入解析 OPSX 的底层工作原理，并将其与旧版工作流进行对比。

desc:Schemas.original: Schemas define what artifacts exist and their dependencies. Currently available:
desc:Schemas.translated: 架构定义定义了存在的工件及其依赖关系。当前可用的有：

desc:Feedback.original: This is rough. That's intentional — we're learning what works.
desc:Feedback.translated: 这只是一个初步版本。我们有意保持这种粗糙状态——我们正在探索什么方案可行。

compare:Structure:opsx.translated: 具有依赖关系的离散制品

compare:Workflow:legacy.translated: 线性阶段：规划 → 实施 → 归档

compare:Workflow:opsx.translated: 流体操作——随时执行任何任务
